headline: NCR Land Disputes Affect 150,000 Sarawak Natives
context: Sarawak Land and Survey recorded 8,200 active Native Customary Rights land disputes affecting 150,000 indigenous residents in 2025.

cards.big: 8,200 active NCR land cases affect 150,000 Sarawak indigenous people
cards.sub: Average case takes 11 years to resolve through the current court system

cards.big: Courts ruled in favour of NCR claimants in 73% of decided cases since 2010
cards.sub: Despite favourable rulings enforcement remains weak with only 41% compliance

cards.big: Logging concessions overlap with 2.3 million hectares of claimed NCR land
cards.sub: Timber companies hold provisional leases dating back to 1970s Brooke-era maps

cards.big: Penan communities filed 340 new claims in 2025 alone over Baram basin lands
cards.sub: Environmental groups documented 45 illegal logging sites within claimed territories

cards.big: NCR backlogs test whether indigenous land rights exist on paper or in practice
150,000 natives with disputed land titles — NCR reform needs cadastral mapping, not more committees.
